resultPayload.note: Step blocked: Exploratory validation blocked: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.

evidence.error: Exploratory validation blocked: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
evidence.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of three types of triggers: time-based (24h before), event-based (booking confirmed), and condition-based (payment due). While the evidence includes event-based and condition-based triggers through the SMS reminders for booking confirmations and payment due notifications, there is no evidence provided that confirms the implementation of time-based triggers (24h before). This indicates a gap in the requirement coverage.
gaps: No evidence of time-based trigger (24h before) implementation.
